blocks.content: You're out there somewhere and I don't even know your name. That's a strange thing to go to bed thinking about.
Daniel's going to run up on me again. Maybe tomorrow. Maybe next week. But it's coming. The question is who I am when it does.
He said 'I'm glad you're here' like it cost him something. For Jonathan, it did.
Down the hall Larry Jr.'s light was off. Mr. Cole's too.
The house was enormous and quiet and mine.
